resources:
PaySmart 285308278238-43rog12vseckpu8qn67dn67nruk8s613.apps.googleusercontent.com Or See all Get started Finish setting up your account
Verify Email Add Address Verify Identity Add Money Send Money Create an account Log in
Continue with Passkey Continue with Email Continue with Google Continue with Facebook Thank you for creating an account For added security, please verify at least one additional login method. Skip linking for now 1020451610284513
fb1020451610284513 b24f1d490075bf2f6795ece09e922519 Select your preferred language You can change the language in your profile settings when you have signed in. Search English (UK) English (US) German (Deutsch) French (Français) Chinese (中文) Portuguese (Português) Spanish (Español) Italian (Italiano) Japanese (日本語) Korean (한국어) United Kingdom United States Germany France China South Korea Italy Japan Spain Portugal Continue OK Error This phone number is linked to an existing Paysmart account. Please login to continue. Dismiss Let us get started Get help 7xxxxxxxxx Enter your phone number to set up your account Welcome back Enter the phone number associated with your PaySmart account Select country of residence We would like to keep you up to date with similar PaySmart product and services by email and other means, so you can untick here if you dont want to receive these communications. By checking this box, you agree to our Terms & Conditions of service and Privacy Notice including verification of your identity through third party and your mobile service providers. Email address Password Have an account? Sign In Log in to Paysmart Enter your password To access your paysmart account, please enter your password. Trouble login in? Recover your account Forgot your password? Create your secure password Use 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol to keep your account protected. Confirm password Create password Creating secure password… Toggle password visibility Enter your passcode Change your password to recover your account. Change Password Set up your passcode This 4–6 digit code is used to unlock your app and confirm actions locally. Change your phone number Lost access to my phone number? Change your phone number without losing access to your account. Change phone number Verify your email to keep your account secured. Verifying your email helps you safely recover your account if you lose access to your phone. We will also send secure communication to your email address. Send verification Verify an email Why add an extra verification method? Linking a second method like Google, Facebook, or email helps you recover access if you lose your primary login. It also keeps your account more secure from unauthorized access. We recommend setting this up before continuing. Do not have an account? Sign Up Sign In Secure your account Add a passcode to keep your money and personal information safe. Only you will be able to access your PaySmart account. Setting up a passcode is required to protect your PaySmart account and financial data. It helps ensure only you can access your funds, even if your device is lost or stolen. Set up passcode Set up biometric
Back Open Never Verified Not verified Completed Required
Profile Log out Version: %1$s (%2$d) PaySmart User Profile photo Verified status Verification pending status Verified account Verification pending
Account information Information about your account Security and privacy Keep your account safe Manage connected accounts External accounts connected Help and support Need help? We have got you About Information about this app
Manage account protection, sign-in options, and privacy controls. Review and manage linked providers such as Google, Facebook, and email. App information, version details, and legal references.
Account information Personal details and profile preferences Verification-driven account limits Transaction history and statement entries Language Select your preferred language
Profile details Loading profile details from local cache. Profile locked You are unable to edit this profile because your account has already been verified. If you need to make changes, please contact customer support. Complete your profile setup Your account setup is incomplete. Finish the following steps to complete verification. Locked Incomplete Complete Full name Date of birth Address line 1 Address line 2 City Email address Phone number Country Postal code / ZIP code Not provided Verify your email Add and verify your home address Complete identity verification Verify email Complete address setup Verify identity Review profile details Profile setup complete Your profile verification is complete. Continue to secure your account. Continue to security setup Add 2-step verification You skipped 2-step verification during onboarding. Enable it now from Security settings. Review 2-step verification 2-step verification Protect your account with an extra sign-in step PaySmart can require an additional verification code on new devices. You can change this later in profile settings. Verify your email first to continue with 2-step verification setup. 2-step verification is already enabled for this account. Continue to 2-step verification setup Verify email to continue Not now Send verification code Verify code and enable Continue Code will be sent to %1$s Verification code Enter 6-digit code Resend code Enter the SMS code sent to your phone.
Account limits Current tier Restricted Standard Enhanced Identity verification Address verification Email verification Last synced: %1$s Limits are derived from current verification status and update after successful sync.
Account statement No statement entries yet. %1$s %2$s %3$.2f %1$s at %2$s Status: %1$s
Resolve home address Confirm address Final confirmation Enter your house info and postcode. We will resolve a verified address from map providers. Please confirm your resolved address on the map. Review and edit your address details before saving. House / building Postcode Country code (ISO-2) Resolve address Resolved address Address line 1 City State / region Country Postcode Coordinates Provider Use this address Have you lived at this address for more than 6 months? No Yes Back to map confirmation
Identity verification Identity verification is the final setup step for account limits and high-risk actions. Verification flow 1. Capture government-issued identity document. 2. Confirm name and date of birth match your profile. 3. Run selfie/liveness verification and submit. Capture document Encrypt on device Upload encrypted payload Generate device attestation Commit verification request Document type Passport Driver license National ID Selected: %1$s (%2$s) Capture/select document Replace document Submit encrypted verification Pending In progress Completed Failed Identity upload submitted. Verification is pending review. Back to setup Issuing country %1$s (%2$s) %1$s (Unavailable) Capture guide: %1$s (%2$s frame) Passport Card Generic This document type is currently not accepted. This document type is accepted but upload is not yet enabled in this build.`r`n Validating capture… Use file instead Camera permission is required to capture your document. Allow camera Capture document Capturing…
Add money Top up your wallet with Stripe PaymentSheet (sandbox). Amount Currency Open Stripe PaymentSheet I completed payment, refresh status Session: %1$s Status: %1$s Appearance App visual style and reading comfort System Light Dark Total balance No wallet data yet wallet %1$s %2$s More actions %1$s balance %1$s %2$s View account limits Send Add Withdraw Convert Transactions Account details Recent activity To recipient Topup via bank transfer -%1$s %2$s +%1$s %2$s Successful Failed Rewards pts £%1$s What are Rewards Rewards history You earned points from your transaction Create Flutterwave session Continue payment securely Provider: %1$s Stripe Flutterwave
No Connection There was a problem connection to our servers. Please try again. Return to Login Waiting for internet connection…
Cancel Processing… Search Filter Select status Select document type Accepted Not accepted (not accepted)
Unlock with biometrics Use fingerprint or face Cancel Face ID Use face ID authentication
Passkey setup Register a device passkey and verify it against your PaySmart backend profile. Create passkey Passkey registered Verify passkey
Third-party identity verification Use provider handoff for start, callback and resume while local flow stays isolated. Provider: %1$s Session: %1$s Not started Status: %1$s Callback event: %1$s Reason: %1$s Start provider session Resume provider status Open provider SDK/Web
Check your email We sent a verification email to Not you? Change email Click the link in the email to verify your address. Check spam if it is missing from inbox. Open email app Resend email Resending…
Enter your full legal name exactly as it appears on your government ID. First name Middle name (optional) Last name Email address Date of birth YYYY-MM-DD Pick date of birth You must be 18 or older to use PaySmart.
Reauthenticate For your security, please verify your identity Enter OTP Verify Verifying… Resend code Resend available in %1$ds Signing in… Creating your account… Verify phone number Enter the 6-digit code sent to %1$s Did not receive it? Retry in %1$d seconds Resend OTP Resending… Continue Verifying… Invalid verification code Unable to finish account setup. Please retry.
Too many attempts. Please wait… Biometric authentication failed Enter your 4-digit passcode to log in Passcode Hide passcode Show passcode
Change password Use your current local password to set a new one. Current password New password Confirm new password Update password Updating…
Change phone number Verify a new phone number to keep account recovery and sign-in secure. Send OTP Sending… OTP code Confirm phone change
You add Tap to select 1 %1$s = %2$s %3$s Paying in Paying with Arrives Today - in seconds Today Estimate after quote You pay Payment method Refresh live FX quote Select currency
Add a recipient Recipient details Review recipient Recipient ready Method Details Review Done Pending In progress Completed %1$s: %2$s You send Recipient gets From Amount To 1 %1$s = %2$s %3$s Quote source: %1$s Switch FX method: %1$s Refresh live FX quote Selected method: %1$s Volt tag Recipient email Recipient mobile Note Full name IBAN BIC (optional) SWIFT (optional) Bank name Document file reference Document type Recipient full name Review recipient Method: %1$s Amount: %1$s %2$s Recipient currency: %1$s FX: 1 %1$s = %2$s %3$s Quoted recipient amount: %1$s %2$s - Lookup: tag=%1$s, email=%2$s, mobile=%3$s Bank: %1$s, IBAN=%2$s Document: ref=%1$s, type=%2$s Email request: %1$s, name=%2$s Recipient draft confirmed This completes SEND-002 UI flow state. Transfer creation comes in SEND-003/004. Continue to details Back to method picker Review recipient Edit recipient Confirm recipient Back to home Start another recipient Find on PaySmart Bank details Upload screenshot or invoice Pay by email Search by tag, email, or mobile number Enter recipient name and IBAN We fill recipient details from screenshot/photo/PDF Request recipient bank details by email Saving recipient draft… Account setup in a few clear steps We tailor this to your country (%1$s) and keep extra checks behind feature access. Required to unlock core account Optional now, strongly recommended Provide legal details Enter your full legal name, email and date of birth exactly as shown on your government ID. Set your local password Used for account recovery and secure sign-in fallback. We will never ask you to share it. Enable biometric unlock Faster secure access. If skipped, reminders may appear in security prompts. Verify your email Link Google/Facebook or add email manually. You can skip now and verify later when features require it. What you can do with PaySmart in %1$s Your available features depend on your selected country. Next Email verification successful Your email has been successfully verified. Back to the app Unlock with Face ID Authenticating… Verify an email Email sign-in button Google sign-in button Facebook sign-in button Select language Select country Close Warning Gift Selected Help PaySmart logo Backspace Get 10 GBP Document capture frame for %1$s Hide password Show password Checking… Enter passcode Confirm passcode Save passcode Saving… Welcome to PaySmart app Transactions %1$s %2$s %1$s · %2$s Earn more by completing transfers and invites No recent transactions yet. Services Services unlock after completing required security steps. Create invoice Before you add money Before you send money Before you create an invoice Complete these checks to unlock add money. Complete these checks to unlock send money. Protect invoice data with at least two security methods before you create and share invoices. Enable at least two security methods Security strength: %1$d of %2$d methods enabled No transaction activity Your recent transaction activity will show here when you send, receive, or deposit money. Account information Exchange rate View rates 1 %1$s = %2$s %3$s %1$s → %2$s unavailable Daily limits Identity verified. Full limits are active. Verify identity to unlock higher limits. Add and verify home address to continue. Verify email to continue. Your transactions will show here when you receive, send, add, or convert money. Transaction details Status Amount Date Time Reference This password is stored locally for secure account recovery. Never share it. PaySmart will never ask for it. Help Support: %1$s Invalid email Enter your email Referral Earn %1$s Your code: %1$s Do you have a referral code? Use a referral code to get %1$s after you transfer above %2$s Enter referral code (Optional) *By clicking submit, you agree to our terms and conditions. Submit I don’t have a referral code Referral hero image placeholder My accounts
Open a PaySmart account Complete your account setup Secure your account and do even more
Reset password Transaction PIN Passkey Passkey is enabled Passkey is not enabled Enable/disable Face or Touch ID View privacy settings Hide balance Passkey Manage your device passkey for faster, more secure sign-in. Enable passkey Enabled Disabled Registered devices Added %1$s Credential ID: %1$s Revoke Revoking... Device Backed up Local only %1$s • %2$s unknown Add passkey You skipped passkey setup during onboarding. Enable it now from Security settings. Open passkey settings
